L1.area: Image decoding and codec processing logic

L2.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists where a palette-mode image with dimensions exceeding the allocated buffer size is decoded without a bounds check, allowing out-of-bounds memory writes when processing a crafted image file.

L3.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in the PCX image decoder where a palette-mode (P mode) image with dimensions exceeding the allocated buffer size is decoded without a bounds check, allowing out-of-bounds memory writes when processing a crafted PCX file.

ground_truth.reason: The PCX decoder in ImagingPcxDecode lacks a bounds check for P mode images, allowing a buffer overrun when state->xsize exceeds state->bytes.
